Case Snapshot

Jurisdiction: South Africa (ZA)

Guardian-approved certified findings: 3
Verified contradictions: 0
Candidate contradiction leads: 1

What the Record Shows
The sealed record centers on a contradiction about whether Kevin's Export proceeded while the agreement remained active.
Other people or entities already tied into the same pattern are Kevin Lappeman and Greensky Solutions.
How this pattern shows up in the record: certified findings and the contradiction ledger converge on the same order-completion dispute.

People and Roles
- Harmed party: this pass does not resolve that role cleanly enough to publish it.
- Publication note: offence and role labels stay out of this section unless the sealed record anchors them separately.
- Other affected parties: Kevin Lappeman and Greensky Solutions
- Visual forensic finding: A high-severity signature overlay anomaly remains logged for manual verification on page 2.

Certified Findings
- Agreement contradiction: Marius confirms Kevin completed the order while the agreement remained active (pages 127, 128, 129)
  Why this matters: It anchors the contradiction against later denial that any exclusivity agreement existed.
- No exclusivity claim: Kevin denies that any exclusivity agreement existed (pages 132)
  Why this matters: It conflicts with the anchored order-completion position and keeps the contradiction at candidate level until paired review matures.
- Eviction pressure position: The record links the dispute to non-renewal, vacate, or eviction-pressure events (pages 27, 47)
  Why this matters: It shows practical consequences tied to the same dispute.

What Still Needs Proof or Review
- Review the sealed audit report and findings package for unresolved items and supporting gaps.

- Start with 127, 128, 129, 132, 27, and 47.
- p. 127 - Agreement contradiction: Marius confirms Kevin completed the order while the agreement remained active (pages 127, 128, 129)

Recommended Next Steps
